description: Draft has a self-referential outcome ("if this market resolves X"). Reviewer flags manipulation_resistant = no.

input.question: Will a majority of 42.space users vote this market resolved?

reviews.reviewProse: Self-referential — the market's own participants decide resolution, which creates an arbitrage incentive: buy No, vote No. Cannot ship as a real market.

rubricVotes.rationale: Resolver is the user pool — not an external source.

criticisms.rationale: Replace with an external resolution source unrelated to market participation.
